Authenticate your items
settings.text:
Authenticate new and used luxury items, sneakers, streetwear and more.
Our team of professional authenticators with more than 6 years of
experience will carefully verify your item in less than 30 minutes

settings.title: Verify Your Certificate
settings.text: Every LegitGrails authenticity certificate has a unique code that can be searched on our website. If the certificate was issued by our team - it will definitely pop up! Otherwise, you might be dealing with a fake version of our certificate.

settings.title: Verify Your Certificate
settings.text:
On this page you can search for your authenticity certificate. This can
be done by entering the unique code, which can be found on the
authenticity certificate, in the search bar below.

settings.title: Did Not Find Your Certificate?
settings.text: In case you were not able to find your authenticity certificate, feel free to contact us via our live chat, our email, or our Instagram.

settings.title: Why Is The Authenticity Certificate Useful?
settings.text:
• Link to a specific item, no way to swap it
• Build trust from your buyers
• Boost your sales
• State the reasons if an item is fake
• Crucial for the dispute process

settings.title: with LegitGrails
settings.text: Are you an online reseller or a business owner that deals with branded items? Let's work together to get rid of fakes.

settings.title: The Most Advanced Authentication Service
settings.text: Discover our luxury authentication process and why LegitGrails is essential when dealing with branded items.

settings.block_description: Our authenticators achieve the highest level of accuracy with the experience of more than 6 years in the industry and by improving knowledge through constant research.
Accuracy rates are also enhanced by requiring photos of specific details of your items. The result of each authentication is explained in detail.
We provide authenticity certificates that are unique to each verified item. Buyers can use it in a dispute if their item is fake. Sellers build trust with their customers and increase sales.
Our team has put together the most extensive library of authentication guides. Browse it on our website as a free alternative to our service.

settings.title: Transparency Project
settings.text: We strive for authenticity in everything our company does. While the authentication process may seem secretive, our team goal is to achieve 100% transparency in our methods. Check out our case studies to learn how the process of authenticating your items from our end works!

settings.title: Why Should I Choose LegitGrails?
settings.text:
The LegitGrails Team is trusted by numerous resellers and reselling
stores. We have more than 6 years of experience in the market, while
some of our legit check experts have been doing this for much longer.
Our knowledge is backed up by the free library of legit check guides.

settings.title: How Does The Legit Check Service Work?
settings.text: All you need to do is upload the photos of your item! It is that easy. You can then choose your preferred response time up to your convenience. The outcome and the authenticity certificate will appear in your inbox or live chat within your selected time (no longer than 24h).

settings.title: What Items Can I Authenticate?
settings.text:
We authenticate most of the Hype, Luxury and Streetwear brands. Got any
questions? Leave us a message on the live chat available on the website!

settings.title: What Photos Do I Upload?
settings.text: Please refer to our Photo Examples page for comprehensive instructions and useful examples of photos needed for a reliable authenticity check.

settings.title: Will I Receive An Authenticity Certificate?
settings.text: Of course!

settings.title: What If My Item Is Fake?
settings.text:
Our RefundGrails consultancy service
is meant to help people manage the dispute processes. Get the money you
spent on a fake item back to your account with the help of our
professionals!

settings.block_description: Our mission is to empower consumers and businesses with the confidence to buy and sell branded fashion items without the fear of counterfeits.
We're creating a network for secure investment in authentic brands, eliminating the risks of counterfeits, and fostering a safe and trustworthy fashion marketplace.
Our 3 authentication teams at LegitGrails possess over 6 years of experience in reselling and authentication training, ensuring a reliable and thorough authentication process.
We meticulously examine every item sent to our team, providing a unique authenticity certificate that guarantees our rigorous authentication process.

settings.title: LegitGrails Authentication Experts
settings.text: Professionals with more than 6 years of experience in the industry. They pass regular authentication tests and ensure an accuracy rate of over 99% on their specialisation brands.

settings.title: The Luxury Team
settings.text: From Chanel, Gucci and Louis Vuitton to Amiri and Valentino - we provide luxury items authentication for any luxury brand out there!

settings.title: The Hype Team
settings.text: Our experts will authenticate any of your Jordans, Yeezys or Travis Scott collabs! Any hype brand you can think of - we authenticate it.

settings.title: The Streetwear Team
settings.text: Want to get your Supreme Bogo or Vlone Love t-shirts authenticated? Our streetwear authentication team has got your back!
Link all your authenticated items to an immutable NFT certificate and increase the liquidity of your inventory
Earn royalties yourself and let your customers earn the royalties after the item is subsequently resold!
Increase the trust of your customers and pass on the ownership of the certificate to them

settings.title: Featured Questions
settings.text:
Is it a one time payment?

Yes, this is a one time payment, there is no recurring charge. Whenever you wish to purchase more authentications, this can be done by repurchasing this plan.

Can I change the item I am authenticating?

In case you’ve sent us an item and the verification is no longer needed, you can ask our team to change if the item has not been yet verified. That way, our team will understand the situation, and this will count as one authentication.

How will we communicate?

All communication is done via email at info@legitgrails.com!

settings.title: You Don't Have a LegitGrails Certificate?
settings.text: Authenticate your items to receive a standard LegitGrails authenticity certificate. If you have that, your NFT is just a click away!

settings.title: PDF certificate
settings.text:
Can be faked and copied

Not 100% reliable from buyers' perspective

Can be used for several items

Does not offer royalties

settings.title: NFT certificate
settings.text:
Stored on a blockchain - impossible to hack or change

100% transparent & provides ownership history

Guarantees uniqueness

Provides royalties from every subsequent resale

settings.button_label: See an example of our NFT Certificate

settings.block_description: When listed on an NFT marketplace, stores information about the creator (LegitGrails), item authenticity, and ownership history.
If you sell an item, you can give or sell the NFT certificate to your buyer's wallet and it will be stored on the Ethereum blockchain forever.
Just like artists of NFT artworks, you also receive royalties as the original owner of the LegitGrails authenticity certificate.

settings.title: What You Can Do With an NFT Certificate
Decide on pricing of your NFT certificate
settings.text:
There are several ways to do so:

• Transfer the ownership of the certificate to the buyer for free

• Set a price for the certificate in crypto and sell it from your NFT page

• Or include the price of your NFT certificate in the price of your physical item wherever you sell it.

settings.title: Publish a link to your NFT Certificate
settings.text: When publishing your item on an online store or marketplace, refer those who want to check its authenticity to your NFT certificate page. You can refer to your certificate page on the LegitGrails NFT Certificate hub that is sent to you when we transfer the NFT to your wallet. You can also publish the certificate on any NFT  marketplace and refer your buyers there.

settings.title: Ask your buyer to provide a crypto wallet
settings.text: Request a crypto wallet from the next owner when you sell your physical item with the NFT certificate

settings.title: Transfer ownership of your certificate
settings.text: If you are selling the item and want to transfer ownership of the certificate, simply go to your NFT page and click "Transfer". Enter your buyer's wallet address and confirm the transaction.

settings.title: Using NFT Certificates to Sell Physical Items

settings.block_description: NFT is a blockchain technology which allows to create immutable digital record that will be forever stored online and protected from hacks and data
When you get your NFT certificate, even LegitGrails cannot change the data and the outcome that has been stored as an NFT. It gets uploaded to
Your NFT certificate becomes completely owned by YOU and no one else. It’s the same as owning private property in real life, NFT technology just allows people
We support all Polygon-compatible wallets. Here are popular Polygon wallets: Metamask, Trust Wallet, My Ether Wallet.

settings.text: Legitgrails OU (“Legitgrails” or “we”) wants to ensure that your visit to our website is smooth, reliable and as useful to you as possible. To help us do this, we use cookies to make our website relevant to your interests and needs.

settings.title: What are cookies?
settings.text: Cookies are small text files that are automatically placed on your computer, tablet, mobile phone or other device (“device”) when you visit our website. They are stored by your internet browser and may contain basic information about your device or internet use. Your browser sends these cookies back to our website every time you revisit it, so we can recognize your computer or mobile device and personalize and improve your browsing experience.

settings.title: What type of cookies do we use?
settings.text: The cookies we use fall into 3 categories. These categories are described below:
settings.dropdown:
Essential and functional cookies

Essential cookies are necessary for the proper functioning of our website and to help you access and move around our site and use all its features. We also use functional cookies, for example to remember your language preferences to save you the trouble of having to change these every time you enter our website. Without these cookies, our website would not work properly and you would not be able to use certain important features.

Shopify

Storage time:

  • _secure_session_id : sessional cookies
  • _shopify_uniq: expires midnight (relative to the visitor) of the next day
  • _shopify_visit: 30 minutes from the last visit
  • _session_id: sessional
  • _cart: 2 weeks
  • _storefront_digest: indefinite
  • _gdpr: 1 year
  • _land: 1 year

Analytics cookies

We use cookies to help us understand how visitors arrived at our website, how and how long they use it and how we can improve their experience. This type of so-called "analytics" cookies can provide us with information to help us understand which parts of our website interest our visitors and if they experience any errors. We use these cookies to test different designs and features for our sites and we also use them to help us monitor how our visitors reach our sites. 

We use Google Analytics to place and read cookies for the above mentioned use. We have changed our Google Analytics settings to further protect your privacy. For example, we have made sure that the last octet of your IP-address is invisible and have turned off the setting which allows sharing data with Google. We are also not using any other Google Analytics related cookie services which are offered by Google.

Personal Data processed: Tracker and Usage Data.

Place of processing: United States – Privacy Policy – Opt Out; Ireland – Privacy Policy – Opt Out.

Storage duration:

  • AMP_TOKEN: 1 hour
  • _ga: 2 years
  • _gac*: 3 months
  • _gat: 1 minute
  • _gid: 1 day
  • _gaexp: 90 days

Advertising and marketing cookies

We only place advertising, marketing and social media cookies if you have given us your permission to do this.

Advertisement and marketing cookies collect information about your browsing habits in order to make our content and advertising as relevant to you and your interests as possible. These cookies are also used to help us measure the effectiveness of our advertising campaigns by tracking the number of clicks. The cookies are usually placed by third party advertising networks. They remember the websites you visit and use this information to give you access to interesting and exciting content on our website and to show you more personalized adverts when you visit other websites. These cookies also help improve your browsing experience, for example by helping to prevent the same advertisement from reappearing to you.

Additionally, social media platforms such as Facebook and Twitter can use cookies to see if you are logged in and allow you to "like" content or forward it to your friends. Depending on your settings, these third parties may use your information for their own purposes, such as advertising. If you would like to know more about how these social media platforms use data, please refer to the privacy notices of these platforms.

Users can opt out of Google's use of cookies by visiting Google's Ads Settings.

Personal Data processed: Tracker, unique device identifiers for advertising (Google Advertiser ID or IDFA, for example) and various types of Data as specified in the privacy policy of the service.

Place of processing: United States – Privacy Policy – Opt Out; Ireland – Privacy Policy – Opt Out.

Storage time:

  • IDE: 2 years 
  • _gcl_*: 3 months (Google Ads)
  • test_cookie: 15 minutes
  • _bcookie: 2 years 
  • _lidc: 1 day 
  • _fb: 3 months

settings.title: Withdrawing your consent
settings.text: You can withdraw your consent to advertising, marketing and social media cookies by using our consent management tool, which you can find here.

settings.title: Managing your cookie settings and deleting cookies
settings.text:
As explained above, we only place advertising and targeting cookies (including tracking cookies) if you have given us your consent for doing this. If you have given us your consent but would like the cookies that we have placed to be removed, you can do this by deleting them via your browser. Search for "cookies" under your web browser's “Help menu” or visit www.allaboutcookies.org for more information on how to do this.

You can also enable or disable (types of) cookies via your browsing settings. For example, you can have the browser notify you when you receive a new cookie, delete individual cookies or delete all cookies. Most advertising networks offer you a way to opt out of advertising cookies. See the Digital Advertising Alliance Consumer Choice and Your Online Choices pages for useful information on how to do this.

Please note that, if you choose to delete Adyen cookies, your access to some functionality and areas of our website may be degraded or restricted.

settings.title: Further information about our use of data
settings.text: You can find more information about the way we handle personal data in our Privacy Policy.

settings.title: Questions, comments or in need of help?
settings.text: If you have any questions or if we can help you with something, we would be happy to assist if you contact us at: info@legitgrails.com
